title: phegopteris subincisa
intro: Phegopteris subincisa, also known as the cut-leaf fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris subincisa include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
